content:
Heyo! I've run into some blockers. I gave it a shot but they're too challenging for me to tackle, so I'm asking a kind soul for mercy :bow:

Blocking:
https://github.com/roc-lang/roc/issues/10270

Non-blocking:
https://github.com/roc-lang/roc/issues/10321
https://github.com/roc-lang/roc/issues/10315
https://github.com/roc-lang/roc/issues/10297

I've verified that all issues reproduce on latest main(85a2a8413ec3134155dc210aba7f4bc597c4d47f).
Thank you! And, actually, only one is a true blocker! I re-arranged them.
the blocker one is the most time-consuming to fix unfortunately :sweat_smile:
